title: MINEAXICORE
description: MINEAXICORE create your own maps with scripts and 3D models and editor easily!
body:
**Description**
**MINEAXICORE** - is an engine for creating maps that consists of several mods that will speed up the construction of the map, and also supports 3D models from the Block Display website, Create maps with a click of a finger, also this engine changes the GUI of the command block now it looks like writing code in programming, also additional useful commands that simplify writing commands.

**CREATORS > Miragment Studio**
**_ IMPORTANT, READ ALL THE DOCUMENTS THERE, THERE IS ALL THE INSTRUCTIONS!_**
